tooltip.setDefault: Set OrPAD as default app for supported files
welcome:
Drag a file here, press Ctrl+O to open,
or Ctrl+N to create a new file.
dialog.unsavedDetail: Your changes will be lost if you don't save them.
update.title: Update Available
update.confirmMessage: Continuing will close OrPAD and launch the installer for the new version. Save your work first.
update.confirmMessage.mac: Continuing will close OrPAD and open the new-version DMG. Launch the new OrPAD from the DMG, or drag it to Applications (or any location) first. Save your work first.
update.inProgressMessage: An update is currently being installed. Please reopen OrPAD after the installer finishes.

sidebar.openFolder: Open a folder to get started
dialog.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{0}"?

outline.notSupported: No outline available for this file format

graph.noFile: Open a file to see its graph

tooltip.json.repair: Repair Broken JSON (fix missing quotes, trailing commas, etc.)
tooltip.jsonl.fromArray: Convert JSON Array to JSONL (one object per line)

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.subtitle: Integrated shell, command runner, and AI helpers
terminal.output.truncated: [output truncated in UI after {count} chars; full in-memory block is retained for AI/copy]
terminal.shell.installHint: Install this CLI and ensure it is on PATH.
terminal.runner.banner: Command Runner runs one explicit command at a time with shell:false. Use Terminal mode for TUI apps and interactive shells.
terminal.runner.error.shellOperator: Shell operator "{op}" is not supported. Command Runner runs one explicit command with shell:false.
terminal.runner.outside.title: Run outside workspace?
terminal.runner.outside.body: The working directory is outside the current workspace.
terminal.runner.outside.scope: This approval applies to this command run only.
terminal.desktopOnly.runner: Command Runner is available only in the Electron desktop app.
terminal.desktopOnly.full: Full terminal is available only in the Electron desktop app.
terminal.unavailable.environment: Integrated terminal is unavailable in this environment.
terminal.unavailable.build: Integrated terminal is unavailable on this build.
terminal.new.title: New terminal
terminal.new.subtitle: Choose a shell profile
terminal.new.noProfiles: No shell profiles were detected on this system.
terminal.draft.title: Terminal draft
terminal.draft.subtitle: Review before pasting. Multiline drafts are copy-only.
terminal.empty.title: No terminal running
terminal.empty.subtitle: Click + or choose a shell profile to start in the approved workspace.
terminal.blocks.title: Command blocks
terminal.outside.title: Open terminal outside workspace?
terminal.outside.body: The terminal working directory is outside the current workspace.
terminal.outside.scope: This approval applies to this terminal session only.
terminal.start.processExited: Process exited. Close the tab or open a new shell with +.
terminal.start.multilineCopyOnly: Multiline drafts are copy-only to avoid accidental execution.
terminal.window.title: OrPAD Terminal
terminal.window.confirmDockBody1: Dock this terminal window back into the main OrPAD window?
terminal.window.confirmDockBody2: Running terminal sessions in this detached window will be closed. Reopen a shell from the main panel after docking.
terminal.window.aiContextCopied: AI context copied. Open AI in the main window to use it.
ai.composer.placeholder: Ask about this tab, or use /model, /clear, /copy, /file <path>
ai.provider.keyPlaceholder: Paste API key to save or replace
ai.footer.tokenEstimate: {prompt} prompt tokens / about {total} with context / ${cost} est.{runner}
ai.context.none: No active document. Chat still works; open a file to attach document context.
ai.empty.readyPromptWithDoc: Ask for a rewrite, explanation, or format transform using the current document as context.
ai.empty.readyPromptNoDoc: Ask a general question, or open a document to attach file context.
ai.code.prefillSafetyTitle: Prefills only. Commands are never auto-executed from AI responses.
ai.diff.title: Apply AI result
ai.diff.confirmReplace: Replace the current selection or document with the AI result?
ai.diff.intro: Review the proposed replacement. Accepting creates a normal undoable editor change.
ai.actions.subtitleNoDoc: Open a document to enable format-aware local and AI-powered tools.
ai.actions.subtitleWithDoc: {type} / {scopes}. Local tools stay on-device; AI-powered tools use {provider}.
ai.actions.noActiveBody: Open a CSV, JSON, Markdown, or Mermaid tab to see local and AI-powered assist tools.
ai.actions.noneBody: Current tools target CSV/TSV, JSON, Markdown, and Mermaid.
ai.actions.providerNeeded: {provider} needs an API key before these can run. Local tools below still work.
ai.actions.providerUses: Uses {provider} and may send document context to the configured provider.
ai.actions.localSubtitle: No AI provider or API key. Runs locally in OrPAD.
ai.actions.openDocumentFirst: Open a document before running an AI action.
ai.mcp.toolResultsReceived: MCP tool results received. Preparing final answer...
mcp.title: MCP servers
mcp.subtitle: Enable a server, then open Tools or Resources. Tool calls always require permission.
mcp.desktopOnlyBody: Open the Electron app to connect local MCP servers.
mcp.noServersBody: Add a server or import an MCP config to get started.
mcp.noResourcesReported: No resources reported. Use Open URI if you know a resource URI.
mcp.toolsTitle: List tools exposed by this MCP server.
mcp.toolsDisabledTitle: Enable this server before listing tools.
mcp.toolsHint: Click a tool to inspect arguments and request permission before running it.
mcp.resourcesTitle: List resources exposed by this MCP server.
mcp.resourcesDisabledTitle: Enable this server before listing resources.
mcp.resourcesUnsupportedTitle: This server does not expose MCP resources.
mcp.resourcesHint: Open a listed resource, or use Open URI if you already know the URI.
mcp.openUriDisabledTitle: Enable this server before opening resources.
mcp.permission.title: MCP permission required
mcp.permission.readOnlyBody: This tool name looks read-only. You can allow once, for this session, or save a global allow.
mcp.permission.mutatingBody: This tool name may mutate data. OrPAD will ask every time and will not persist this permission.
mcp.status.enableBefore: Enable {server} before using MCP {feature}. Current state: {state}.{suffix}
mcp.status.resourcesUnsupported: {server} does not expose MCP resources. Use Tools for this server instead.
mcp.status.noResources: {server}: no resources reported. Use Open URI if you know a resource URI.
mcp.server.label: Label
mcp.tool.argsHelp: Arguments are sent as JSON to the MCP server after the permission prompt.
mcp.args.noneRequiredHelp: No arguments required. Leave {} and run.
ai.action.csv.type-outliers.label: Detect type + outliers
ai.action.csv.type-outliers.description: Infer one column locally and propose clearing inconsistent values.
ai.action.csv.nl-filter.label: Natural-language filter
ai.action.csv.nl-filter.description: Uses the AI provider to convert a plain-language request into filter rules.
ai.action.csv.sql-generate.label: Generate SQL SELECT
ai.action.csv.sql-generate.description: Uses the AI provider to draft a SQL query from the table headers and sample rows.
ai.action.csv.summary-stats.label: Summary stats report
ai.action.csv.summary-stats.description: Compute a local summary report from the current CSV/TSV data.
ai.action.csv.type-consistency.label: Type consistency check
ai.action.csv.type-consistency.descripti: Check inferred column types locally without sending data to an AI provider.
ai.action.json.generate-schema.label: Generate JSON Schema
ai.action.json.generate-schema.descripti: Infer a draft JSON Schema locally from the current document.
ai.action.json.generate-samples.label: Generate samples from schema
ai.action.json.generate-samples.descript: Generate local sample data from the current JSON Schema.
ai.action.json.generate-samples.schemaRe: Open a JSON Schema first, or run Generate JSON Schema on this JSON document.
ai.action.json.flatten-csv.label: Flatten to CSV
ai.action.json.flatten-csv.description: Flatten JSON into CSV locally without using an AI provider.
ai.action.json.validate-explain.label: Validate + explain
ai.action.json.validate-explain.descript: Validate locally, then use the AI provider to explain the result.
ai.action.json.validation.valid: JSON is valid against the schema.
ai.action.json.validate-explain.promptDe: OrPAD validates the currently open JSON document against this schema. Edit the schema if you want stricter rules, then press OK.
ai.action.json.repair-explain.label: Repair + explain
ai.action.json.repair-explain.descriptio: Repair JSON locally, then use the AI provider to explain the changes.
ai.action.markdown.expand-prd.label: Expand as PRD section
ai.action.markdown.expand-prd.descriptio: Uses the AI provider to expand selected notes into a PRD-style section.
ai.action.markdown.translate.label: Translate selection
ai.action.markdown.translate.description: Uses the AI provider to translate the selected Markdown.
ai.action.markdown.auto-toc.label: Generate / refresh TOC
ai.action.markdown.auto-toc.description: Generate a Markdown table of contents locally from headings.
ai.action.markdown.tone-shift.label: Tone shift
ai.action.markdown.tone-shift.descriptio: Uses the AI provider to rewrite the selected Markdown tone.
ai.action.markdown.extract-checklist.des: Uses the AI provider to turn the document into a concise task checklist.
ai.action.mermaid.decompose-node.label: Decompose node into 3 substeps
ai.action.mermaid.decompose-node.descrip: Uses the AI provider to rewrite a selected Mermaid node into substeps.
ai.action.mermaid.error-paths.label: Add error-path edges
ai.action.mermaid.error-paths.descriptio: Uses the AI provider to add plausible error, timeout, or retry paths.
ai.action.mermaid.describe.label: Describe diagram in prose
ai.action.mermaid.describe.description: Uses the AI provider to summarize the diagram in prose.
ai.action.mermaid.flow-to-sequence.label: Convert flowchart to sequence
ai.action.mermaid.flow-to-sequence.descr: Uses the AI provider to convert a Mermaid flowchart into a sequence diagram.
